position_news.summary: Please find enclosed herewith the Certificate received from MUFG Intime India Private Limited (formerly Link Intime India Private Limited), Company s Registrar and Share Transfer Agent for the quarter ended 30th June 2026 certifying compliance with Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018. |SUBJECT: Certificate under SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018

recent_announcements.summary: DUDIGITAL GLOBAL LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Pendency of Litigation(s)/dispute(s) or the outcome impacting the Company |SUBJECT: Pendency of Litigation(s)/dispute(s) or the outcome impacting the Company

ZYDUS WELLNESS LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 04-Aug-2026 to inter-alia consider and approve the Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the Quarterly ended June 2026 . |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation

recent_announcements.company: Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Limited
recent_announcements.summary: Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Appointment of Mr Rajesh Davera as Non- Executive Independent Director of the company w.e.f. July 15, 2026. |SUBJECT: Appointment
Ashok Leyland Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Change in the scheduled time of 77th AGM'. |SUBJECT: Updates
KCP Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Dividend updates'. |SUBJECT: Updates
KCP Limited has informed the Exchange that Record date for the purpose of Dividend  is 12-Aug-2026. |SUBJECT: Record Date

Significant increase in volume has been observed in CARYSIL LIMITED. The Exchange, in order to ensure that investors have latest relevant information about the company and to inform the market place so that the interest of the investors is safeguarded, had written to the company. CARYSIL LIMITED has submitted their response. |SUBJECT: Spurt in Volume
